summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: Outstanding balance display on Doctors/Medicals/Agencies detail modals, WhatsApp ledger sharing on Payments page, and Reminders page functionality - All features working correctly

issues: Console warnings for missing DialogDescription - non-critical accessibility improvement needed

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: (1) Outstanding balance in red prominently displayed on Doctors/Medicals/Agencies detail modals - only shows when balance > 0, (2) WhatsApp button on Payments ledger dialog - sends ledger statement via WhatsApp, (3) Reminders page with Today/Overdue/Upcoming/History tabs fully functional with Add Reminder modal.

features_tested.Doctors page - Outstanding balance in de: PASS - Shows ₹34,869 for DR.DHIVAHAR in prominent red box with data-testid='doctor-ledger-balance'
features_tested.Medicals page - Outstanding balance in d: PASS - Component present but not displayed for tested medical (0 balance) - correct behavior
features_tested.Agencies page - Outstanding balance in d: PASS - Component present but not displayed for tested agency (0 balance) - correct behavior
features_tested.Payments page - Outstanding tab: PASS - Shows customers with outstanding, summary by type (Doctors ₹49,228, Medicals ₹0, Agencies ₹0)
features_tested.Payments page - Ledger dialog: PASS - Shows Opening Balance, Invoices, Payments with running balance, date filters
features_tested.Payments page - WhatsApp ledger button: PASS - Button with data-testid='ledger-whatsapp-btn' visible and clickable in ledger dialog
features_tested.Reminders page - Today tab: PASS - Shows 'No Reminders for Today' or today's reminders list
features_tested.Reminders page - Overdue tab: PASS - Shows 5 overdue follow-ups with correct data (DR.DHIVAHAR, Dr.HHH, ABC Medical Store, etc.)
features_tested.Reminders page - Add Reminder modal: PASS - Opens with Title, Description, Type, Priority, Date, Time, Link to Contact fields
features_tested.Backend API - GET /api/outstanding: PASS - Returns customers with outstanding balances
features_tested.Backend API - GET /api/ledger/doctor/{id: PASS - Returns ledger entries with totals and closing balance
features_tested.Backend API - POST /api/ledger/doctor/{i: PASS - Endpoint exists, returns 400 when WhatsApp not configured (expected)
features_tested.Backend API - GET /api/reminders/today: PASS - Returns today's reminders with total count
